tiers.name: Custom AI Automation
tiers.best_for: Established businesses with multi-step client workflows — financial planners, real estate, medical practices, law firms, hotels, multi-site operators
includes: Custom workflow design (n8n + Claude + your existing systems)
Integration with AdviserLogic, Xplan, LEAP, Cliniko, PropertyMe, Xero, Microsoft 365

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.best_for: Sole traders wanting more website leads

tiers.name: SEO + AI Visibility
tiers.price_display: Custom pricing — book a discovery call
tiers.best_for: Service businesses invisible in search and AI answers — especially regulated industries like financial planning, medical, legal where generic SEO agencies don't understand the compliance layer
includes: Technical SEO fixes — meta descriptions, H1 hierarchy, schema markup, page titles, social preview tags, robots.txt cleanup
AI visibility optimisation (GEO) — makes your business findable in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini
FAQ schema and comparison content that AI engines pull directly into answers
llms.txt file + entity linking for AI understanding
Google Business Profile optimisation + local visibility work
E-E-A-T markup for regulated industries (named authors, credentials, regulatory register links)
2 keyword-targeted articles per month, with video transcription where the client has a video library
Monthly AI citation tracking — where do ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini surface you, what competitors appear instead
Weekly 30-min call, direct access to Jarek (not an account manager)
Coordination with the client's existing Google Ads agency — no toe-stepping
does_not_include: Google Ads management (we coordinate with the client's existing ads agency)
Website rebuild — all fixes work within the existing site

oneoff_services.name: AI Strategy Consultation
oneoff_services.price_display: Free 30-min call, or paid discovery from $2,500
oneoff_services.description: We map your current processes, identify automation opportunities, and deliver a roadmap with priorities, effort estimates, and ROI projections. Works as a standalone engagement or the first step of a full automation project.

oneoff_services.name: SEO Quick Fix
oneoff_services.description: Fix your top Google issues — meta tags, schema, headings, social sharing, plus AI visibility basics (FAQ schema, llms.txt) so you're findable in ChatGPT and Perplexity too.

oneoff_services.name: AI Visibility Audit
oneoff_services.description: Full audit of your presence across traditional Google search AND AI-generated answers. Covers technical SEO signals plus GEO-specific checks: AI citation tracking in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, FAQ schema readiness, llms.txt status, Reddit and authoritative directory presence. Delivered as a PDF report with a prioritised fix list. Standalone, or rolls into the SEO + AI Visibility monthly service.

oneoff_services.name: Website Build + Chatbot
oneoff_services.description: Full website build with integrated AI chatbot.

chatbot_rules: Booking/appointment integration is INCLUDED in all tiers. Never say it costs extra.
Voice AI is INCLUDED in Professional and Operator. Never charge extra for it.
Always say 'from $X/month' — never quote a flat price without 'from'.
Never invent services, features, or prices not listed here.
If unsure, say 'that's included in your plan' or suggest booking a call with Jarek.
